mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grades (enrollment_id, score, grade_level, teacher_id, comment, created_at) VALUES (#{enrollmentId}, #{score}, #{gradeLevel}, #{teacherId}, #{comment}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT s.name AS studentName, s.student_number AS studentNumber, g.score, g.grade_level AS gradeLevel, g.comment FROM grades g JOIN course_enrollments ce ON g.enrollment_id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN students s ON ce.student_id = s.student_id WHERE ce.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY s.student_number
SELECT g.grade_level AS gradeLevel, COUNT(*) AS count FROM grades g JOIN course_enrollments ce ON g.enrollment_id = ce.enrollment_id WHERE ce.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} GROUP BY g.grade_level

SELECT cs.semester, cs.year, CAST(AVG(g.score) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS avgScore, CAST(SUM(c.credit) AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS totalCredit, COUNT(*) AS courseCount FROM grades g JOIN course_enrollments ce ON g.enrollment_id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_schedules cs ON ce.schedule_id = cs.schedule_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id WHERE ce.student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY cs.year, cs.semester ORDER BY cs.year DESC, cs.semester DESC

SELECT ce.enrollment_id AS enrollmentId, s.name AS studentName, s.student_number AS studentNumber, g.score, g.grade_level AS gradeLevel, g.comment FROM course_enrollments ce JOIN students s ON ce.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN grades g ON ce.enrollment_id = g.enrollment_id WHERE ce.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY s.student_number
SELECT * FROM grades WHERE enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId} LIMIT 1
